Under this scheme, financial assistance to the victim along with support services such as shelter, counseling, medical aid, legal assistance, education, etc.

Title: The Punjab Financial Assistance to Acid Victims Scheme
Description: The objective of this Scheme is to provide monthly Financial Assistance to females who have been rendered 40% disabled due to acid attack. This scheme is fully state-sponsored.

Description: The "The Scheme of State Award for Disabled" is a scheme by the Dept. of Social Justice & Special Assistance, Govt. of Maharashtra. Title: The Tripura Tribal Folk Arts & Cultural (Financial Assistance) Rules, 2022
